overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a dark forest at night. The character travels from a dense wooded area past abandoned rural structures into open farmland, with atmospheric fog and moonlight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding forest path surrounded by dense trees and stone walls

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
tall twisted trees with thick trunks forming a dense canopy
winding dirt trail with patches of grass and mud
dense overhead tree cover partially obscuring the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt walking through a dense forest at night. Tall trees and stone walls line the dirt path, creating an enclosed atmosphere with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with abandoned wooden structures

events.description: abandoned wooden cart and broken fence become visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past abandoned rural debris and wooden structures

entered.detail: derelict wooden cart with broken wheels and scattered debris beside the path
collapsed wooden fence posts in the overgrown grass

segments.scene_description: The path opens slightly as Geralt passes abandoned wooden structures including a broken cart and fence. The stone wall shifts to the right side as the forest thins, revealing more of the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland trail with distant views

events.description: landscape opens into wide farmland with expansive fields visible on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through open countryside with fields stretching into the distance and a stone wall running alongside

entered.detail: expansive grassy fields stretching to the horizon under the night sky
white flowering shrubs lining the left side of the path
dark silhouette of a distant tower or structure on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to open farmland with expansive fields visible on the right. The path continues past flowering bushes and stone walls, with a distant tower visible on the horizon under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a claustrophobic, dense forest into an expansive nocturnal landscape. It begins on a narrow dirt path enclosed by towering trees and stone walls that limit the view of the night sky. As the camera moves forward, the forest thins and the path opens up, passing by abandoned wooden structures and a broken cart while the stone walls shift to the side. The scene then expands into open farmland with wide fields stretching to the right and flowering bushes lining the way. Finally, the horizon broadens to reveal a distant tower standing under the clear moonlight.
